generated_bronze_script:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F

spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()

RUN_ID = '6b61cb37-96fb-4fdb-8a3f-68e14f45de4d'
PIPELINE_VERSION = 'v1'
SOURCE_TYPE = 'adls_gen2'
SOURCE_FEED = 'Vendor1_DevInfo'
FILE_FORMAT = 'xml'
TARGET_TABLE = r"bronze.bronze_devinfo"
CHECKPOINT_PATH = r"dbfs:/pipelines/checkpoints/bronze/Vendor1/DevInfo"
SCHEMA_LOCATION = r"dbfs:/pipelines/schemas/bronze/Vendor1/DevInfo"
SOURCE_PATH = r"C:\Users\vaibhavmalik\Documents\Athena-Agentic-\Athena_backend\uploads\adls\Vendor1\DevInfo\2026-12-1_0626DevInfo_.xml"

df = spark.read.format('xml').option('rowTag', 'DevInfo').option('mode', 'PERMISSIVE').load(SOURCE_PATH)
if df.rdd.isEmpty():
    raise ValueError(f'No records found in Bronze landing path: {SOURCE_PATH}')

bronze_df = df.select(
    F.col('sw').cast('double').alias('sw'),
    F.col('os').cast('string').alias('os'),
    F.col('machineId').cast('double').alias('machineId'),
    F.col('fw').cast('double').alias('fw'),
    F.col('RecFw').cast('double').alias('RecFw'),
    F.col('RecTemplates').cast('double').alias('RecTemplates'),
    F.col('model').cast('double').alias('model'),
    F.col('stocksConfig').cast('double').alias('stocksConfig'),
    F.col('bagsConfig').cast('double').alias('bagsConfig'),
    F.col('videoPack').cast('double').alias('videoPack')
) if '*' not in "    F.col('sw').cast('double').alias('sw'),\n    F.col('os').cast('string').alias('os'),\n    F.col('machineId').cast('double').alias('machineId'),\n    F.col('fw').cast('double').alias('fw'),\n    F.col('RecFw').cast('double').alias('RecFw'),\n    F.col('RecTemplates').cast('double').alias('RecTemplates'),\n    F.col('model').cast('double').alias('model'),\n    F.col('stocksConfig').cast('double').alias('stocksConfig'),\n    F.col('bagsConfig').cast('double').alias('bagsConfig'),\n    F.col('videoPack').cast('double').alias('videoPack')" else df
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_run_id', F.lit(RUN_ID))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_ingestion_timestamp', F.current_timestamp())
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_system', F.lit(SOURCE_TYPE))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_feed', F.lit(SOURCE_FEED))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_file_path', F.input_file_name())
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_source_file_name', F.element_at(F.split(F.input_file_name(), '/'), -1))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_file_modification_time', F.lit(None).cast('timestamp'))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_pipeline_version', F.lit(PIPELINE_VERSION))
bronze_df = bronze_df.withColumn('_rescued_data', F.lit(None))

target_schema = TARGET_TABLE.split('.')[0]
spark.sql(f"CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS {target_schema}")
bronze_df.write.format('delta').mode('append').option('mergeSchema', 'true').option('checkpointLocation', CHECKPOINT_PATH).saveAsTable(TARGET_TABLE)
